summary: Move key persistence responsibilities back to database-controlled RPCs and remove polling from configuration and approval surfaces.

notes: Added psa_save_timesheet so timesheet, entry, overtime, and editable project revision persistence happens in one database transaction with database-generated detail ids.
Added psa_save_organization so organization ids, org codes, and manager assignments are saved transactionally by the database.
Added psa_create_employee_business_rows so employee business rows, profile, contract, salary, and role records are created in one database transaction after controlled GoTrue creation.
Updated psa_save_project so blank project codes are generated server-side and duplicate project codes remain a backend-validated error.
Converted function grant assertions from brittle hardcoded counts to required/denied function checks.
Timesheet save no longer sends client-generated detail ids and now refreshes from the saved database state.
Configuration, employee, organization, approval, and report hooks no longer use polling refetch intervals.
TimesheetPage save/submit/week-change handlers now use current hook dependencies instead of stale closures.
create-employee-with-login now defaults login names to the employee name and appends a numeric suffix on duplicates.
GoTrue-created users are still cleaned up when employee business-row creation fails.

verification: Run migration 119 and SQL assertion scripts against a cloud-hosted schema-only temporary database.
Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host before and after deployment.
Run scripts/assert-function-grants.sql and scripts/assert-backend-ownership-rpcs.sql on production.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against https://xpjs.asia/ with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.16.
known_warnings: npm lint still reports existing Fast Refresh warnings and one AnalyticsTab hook dependency warning.
Vite still warns that some chunks are larger than 500 kB.
